no_trade_detail: Raw confidence 25 < 40 gate. Base 45 (0.75x60) + event_risk_very_low +5, battle_grade UNTESTED -25 (level_thesis agent output missing — no defined battle level, no entry trigger thesis, no profit target). Three of 4 specialist agents voted bullish but missing level_thesis eliminates the trigger layer entirely.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Overnight gap sustainability without RTH validation — +$1.26 gap is low-volume premarket, last bar closes RED into peak (05:55 small red), classic gap-fade setup; without level_thesis the gap-fade vs gap-continuation thesis is undefined.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens below 669.00 and fails to hold fast EMA ribbon from below within first 5 minutes of RTH — gap invalidated, ribbon stack inverts, entire bullish thesis reverses.

battle_level.note: Inferred from key-levels.json (prior session RTH high = current price). level_thesis agent output missing — battle_grade UNTESTED, no prior RTH test recorded. This level is a first approximation only; Premarket should re-derive battle level with full thesis.

level_priority.source: Prior session (2025-10-01) RTH high — current price is sitting directly on this level; break above confirms gap-up, rejection below triggers fade
Today premarket high (PMH) — first extension target above 669.37 if gap-up is confirmed
Today premarket low (PML) — gap-down floor; fast EMA (669.11) sits just above this level; breach triggers ribbon stack reassessment
Prior session (2025-10-01) RTH low — gap-fill target on bearish day; validator's primary invalidation target
5-day RTH low (rolling) — macro floor; relevant only on multi-bar continuation bear move

primary.condition: SPY opens at or above 669.37 and first RTH bar closes above it (gap-up confirmed)
primary.note: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (65c spread) + rising VIX compression + zero event risk support a gap-continuation long. Trigger: 669.37 reclaim on pullback test within first 15 min. Target PMH 670.55.

secondary.condition: SPY opens below 669.37 or first RTH bar closes red below 669.00
secondary.note: Gap-fade pattern: last premarket bar closed red into peak, overnight gap unvalidated by RTH flow. Rejection at 669.37 with fast EMA failure → put entry targeting prior RTH low 667.62.

invalidation.condition: SPY opens below 669.00 AND fails to hold fast EMA (669.11) from below within first 5 minutes of RTH
invalidation.effect: Gap fully invalidated. Ribbon stack inverts BULL→BEAR. Macro 'risk_on' signal flips. Both primary scenario and VIX compression thesis are negated; this is a full consensus wipe. No trade in either direction until new setup forms.

swarm_predictions.claim: Prior RTH high 669.37 acts as the pivotal decision level in RTH: SPY either holds above it for 15+ consecutive minutes (gap-up confirmed) OR rejects below 669.00 within the first 30 minutes of RTH
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY oscillates between 669.00 and 669.60 for the entire first 30 minutes without a clean directional resolution — neither holds nor breaks decisively

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 17.0 through 11:00 ET given MID regime falling trend (-0.55%) and zero scheduled macro events today
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX spikes above 17.5 within the first 30 minutes of RTH on an opening down-gap or surprise news headline

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (65c spread, fast 669.11 > pivot 668.98 > slow 668.46) remains intact through 10:30 ET as long as SPY holds above PML support at 668.76
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon stack inverts to BEAR (fast EMA crosses below pivot) before 10:30 ET, signaling gap-fade continuation rather than gap-hold

synthesis_narrative: Three of four specialists voted bullish on a clean CLEAN_BULL ribbon (65c spread), VIX compression, +$1.26 overnight gap, and tech-led risk-on rotation — but the level_thesis agent output is missing, leaving no defined battle level, no entry trigger thesis, and no profit target. The validator flags the gap as low-volume and unvalidated by RTH order flow with the last premarket bar closing red into the peak. Raw confidence of 25 triggered the NO_TRADE gate: the bullish structural setup is real but without level_thesis the trigger layer is undefined and this is a wait-for-RTH-confirmation day. The single most important thing to watch at open is whether SPY reclaims and holds above 669.37 (prior RTH high) on the first closed RTH bar — that becomes the proxy battle level and gap-confirmation signal.

macro.one_line: VIX 16.19 MID regime falling, zero events today, XLK +1.5% leading SPY — clean risk-on macro backdrop
